title: Allow multiple people to Edit Text Widget
excerpt: The text widgets should allow multiple people to edit at the same time or at least tell you when someone else is in it. Text that you put in just disappears if someone else was also in there at the same time.

posts.author: fidximplementation (fidximplementationteam)
posts.cookedHtml: The text widgets should allow multiple people to edit at the same time or at least tell you when someone else is in it. Text that you put in just disappears if someone else was also in there at the same time.
